title: ajuga ovalifolia f. angustifolia
intro: Ajuga ovalifolia f. angustifolia, also known as Bugleweed or Perennial Bugle, is a flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae, that is native to China. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to inhibit the production of thyroid hormones, making it useful in treating conditions such as hyperthyroidism. The health benefits of Ajuga ovalifolia f. angustifolia include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce stress and promote relaxation. In herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
